title: pelargonium mammulosum
intro: Pelargonium mammulosum, also known as the hairy-leaved rose geranium, is a species of succulent plant within the geranium family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium mammulosum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve stress and anxiety, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and can be used topically as a skin toner or salve.
